ns0:entry.ns0:title: AAswordman/Operit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AAswordman/Operit
Language: kotlin
The most powerful AI agent and AI chat software on Android/Operit是一款Android上能力最为强大、发展最久的AI Agent

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EchoMusicApp/Echo-Music
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EchoMusicApp/Echo-Music
Language: kotlin
A modern Android music app with ad-free streaming, synced lyrics, offline playback, and an intuitive user experience.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RikkaApps/Shizuku
Language: kotlin
Using system APIs directly with adb/root privileges from normal apps through a Java process started with app_process.

Language: kotlin
一个使用原生Android开发的哔哩哔哩安卓客户端，支持触摸、遥控，以及安卓5

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/celzero/rethink-app
Language: kotlin
DNS over HTTPS / DNS over Tor / DNSCrypt client, WireGuard proxifier, firewall, and connection tracker for Android.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/deniscerri/ytdlnis
Language: kotlin

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gkd-kit/gkd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gkd-kit/gkd
Language: kotlin
基于无障碍，高级选择器，订阅规则的自定义屏幕点击安卓应用 | An Android APP with custom screen tapping based on Accessibility, Advanced Selectors, and Subscription Rules

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kavishdevar/librepods
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kavishdevar/librepods
Language: kotlin
AirPods liberated from Apple's ecosystem.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kododake/AABrowser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kododake/AABrowser
Language: kotlin
Android Auto WEB Browser

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pass-with-high-score/universal-installer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pass-with-high-score/universal-installer
Language: kotlin
A modern Android app for installing and managing APK packages with split APK support, silent install via Shizuku, and VirusTotal malware scanning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pppscn/SmsForwarder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pppscn/SmsForwarder
Language: kotlin
短信转发器——监控Android手机短信、来电、APP通知，并根据指定规则转发到其他手机：钉钉群自定义机器人、钉钉企业内机器人、企业微信群机器人、飞书机器人、企业微信应用消息、邮箱、bark、webhook、Telegram机器人、Server酱、PushPlus、手机短信等。包括主动控制服务端与客户端，让你轻松远程发短信、查短信、查通话、查话簿、查电量等。（V3.0 新增）PS.这个APK主要是学习与自用，如有BUG请提ISSUE，同时欢迎大家提PR指正

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ryfineZ/carrier-ims-for-pixel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ryfineZ/carrier-ims-for-pixel
Language: kotlin
Carrier IMS for Pixel (TurboIMS): multilingual (中文/English) pixel ims / ims / carrierconfig / volte / vowifi / 5G+ toolkit for Google Pixel.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/square/okhttp
Language: kotlin
Square’s meticulous HTTP client for the JVM, Android, and GraalVM.
